_comment: External tunables for the Jetson cluster inference coordinator. This file OVERRIDES the built-in defaults in cluster_config.py. If this file is missing or invalid, cluster_config.py falls back to its built-in defaults — the system never crashes. Edit values here; no need to touch Python. Sampling is load-time (applied on next model Load). context.ctx_size is load-time (server launched once with -c). output.max_tokens is per-request (re-read on every chat call; no restart needed).
